visual_description: In a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with mirrors and metal pots, two men in dark clothing and a woman with short blonde hair in a black coat stand together, each pointing a wand forward. The camera then cuts to a young man with glasses and a brown jacket standing amid shelves and hanging glassware, looking directly ahead. The view returns to the three figures, who maintain their pointed stances while the woman gestures with her wand.
audio_description: Spoken Mandarin dialogue is heard, delivered in a calm yet tense tone by a male voice. No other background sounds are audible.
